# Jokes Jar

> The world's funniest corner of the internet. A multilingual joke-sharing platform where users submit, vote on, and discover jokes in 70+ languages.

## Features
- Browse jokes filtered by language, topic/hashtag, and time period
- Vote with thumbs up/down — community-moderated content
- Submit jokes with hashtags in any language
- Joke of the Day, trending topics, random joke generator
- Share jokes via direct links, WhatsApp, Twitter, Facebook
- Dark/Light theme with Apple Liquid Glass design
- Self-moderating: jokes with 20+ thumbs down are auto-removed

## Pages
- [Home — Joke Feed](https://jokesjar.com/)
- [Tag Pages](https://jokesjar.com/tag/doctors)
- [Individual Jokes](https://jokesjar.com/joke/{id})

## Tech
Built with Next.js 15, PostgreSQL, Prisma, deployed on Vercel.
